name: research-paper-autopilot-bundle
description: Evidence-grounded Codex skills bundle for end-to-end research paper projects.

interface.longDescription: A Codex skills bundle centered on research-paper-autopilot, with specialist skills for literature review, experiments, CCF/Nature workflows, writing, review, citation checks, reproducibility, and submission packages.
defaultPrompt: Audit my experiment evidence before drafting.
